---
title: "USGS Wetting"
author: "CLB"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(data.table)
library(tidyverse, warn.conflicts = F)
options(readr.show_col_types = F)
library(googlesheets4)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggpmisc)
library(here)
library(styler)
library(streamMetabolizer)
library(rstan)
options(mc.cores = parallel::detectCores())
library(dataRetrieval)
library(scales)
library(knitr)
library(lubridate)
library(zoo)
library(nasapower)
library(imputeTS)
library(rgbif)
library(foreach)
library(doParallel)
library(broom)
#source(here("Code/priceDrying.R"))
```

# Load Wetting Events

```{r}
usgsSites <- read_csv(here("Data/usgsSites.csv")) %>% 
  rename(gage = site_no)
```

```{r}
wettingEvents <- read_csv(here("Data/wettingRegimes_SubEvents.csv"))
wettingLengths <- read_csv(here("Data/wettingRegimes_wettingLengths.csv")) %>% 
  drop_na(event)
```

## 

# DO Metrics

```{r}
wetEvents <- wetEvents %>% 
  left_join(usgsSites %>% select(-startDate, -endDate, -drainArea, -siteName), by = "gage") %>% 
  filter(!(gage == "02264000" & wetLengthDate == "2025-04-27")) %>% 
  filter(!(gage == "11128500" & wet_date == "2016-10-28")) %>% 
  filter(!(gage == "11128500" & wet_date == "2017-08-24"))




doMet <- list()
for (n in 1:nrow(wetEvents)) {
  row <- wetEvents[n, ]
  cat(paste("Calculating DO Metrics for", wetEvents$gage[n], "rewet date:", wetEvents$wet_date[n], "\n"))
  doMet[[n]] <- do_metrics(site_no = row$gage,
                              start_date = row$wet_date,
                              end_date = row$wetLengthDate,
                              latitude = row$lat,
                              longitude = row$long,
                              elevation = row$elev)
  #Sys.sleep(sample(1:10, 1))
}
doMet <- do.call(rbind, doMet)


```

```{r}
gages2 <- foreign::read.dbf("/Users/connor/Downloads/gagesii_9322_sept30_2011.dbf")
```
